title: The Essential Civ Pack
description:
The Essential Resource Pack for the CivMC 1.20.4 server. Contains updated paintings, goat horn sounds, and zombie textures! 

For users using optifine/optifabric, this resource pack does require three dependencies.
body: This pack adds a randomizer for zombie skins, and changes those skins to Civ Players in-game skins instead. It also updates all twenty six paintings in 1.20.4 to CivMC related paintings, AND changes the Goat Horn sound to a varying amount of new, sillier sounds.
